key_positions: Lead the global transition to climate neutrality by 2050 through the European Green Deal.
Implement the 'Fit for 55' package to reduce emissions by 55% by 2030.
Strongly advocate for a global carbon price and the Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM).
Prioritize energy efficiency and a circular economy approach.
Phase out coal and fossil fuel subsidies rapidly.
red_lines: Inflexible on the target of 1.5 degrees Celsius warming limit.
Requires high transparency and rigorous reporting standards for all international climate commitments.
Will not compromise on the integrity of the EU Emissions Trading System (ETS).
